author: Sun, Jackson Tianshin
imprint: (unpublished ms. contributed to STEDT as electronic text documents)
title: rGBenzhen
notes: JS: "Benzhen is the name of a township in Ma'erkang County, Aba Prefecture, Sichuan Province. My data were recorded from a speaker from the Dashuigou Village. This is a variety of Situ or Eastern rGyalrong, the best-known representative variety of which is Zhuokeji (Cogtse)."
